message:
feat(fwc): add template/export-tools/intent truth contracts to catalog

Implements three truthfulness beads for the catalog module:

- 29.5.2: TemplateDataSource, TemplateProvenance, ValidationOutcome enums
  with provenance tracking for template/validate/examples surfaces
- 29.5.3: ToolInventorySource, ToolAvailability, ExportedToolProvenance,
  McpSurfaceState for host-backed export-tools and serve-mcp truth
- 29.7.2: IntentActionAvailability, IntentSuggestionKind, PlanStepTruth
  for intent/planning layer truth enforcement

84 new tests (562 total catalog tests), all passing.

Beads: 1g7z0.29.5.2, 1g7z0.29.5.3, 1g7z0.29.7.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
